title: Smoky Slovakian Oatmeal Tagine
description: A peppery and creamy Slovakian dish featuring oatmeal, this recipe is kid-friendly and nut-free, cooked to perfection in a tagine pot. It combines the warmth of smoked paprika with the comfort of oatmeal.
instructions: Heat the butter in the tagine pot over medium heat until melted.
Add the smoked paprika, garlic powder, black pepper, and salt, and stir for 1 minute.
Add the oatmeal and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Pour in the heavy cream and chicken broth, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the oatmeal has absorbed most of the liquid and has a creamy consistency.
Remove the tagine pot from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Smoky Slovakian Oatmeal hot, directly from the tagine pot.
